{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"flowchart LR subgraph Input Sources OPT[Constructor Options] SET[fable.settings.Solr] end subgraph Normalization NORM["Property Mapping
Server -> host
Port -> port
Core -> core
Path -> path
Secure -> secure"] end subgraph Output URL["Connection URL
http[s]://host:port/path/core"] CONF["solr-client Config
{ host, port, core, path, secure }"] end OPT --> NORM SET --> NORM NORM --> URL NORM --> CONF ","style":"notebook"}
